title: stellaria graminea var. chinensis
intro: Stellaria graminea var. chinensis, also known as the Chinese starwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Stellaria graminea var. chinensis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and its medicinal properties can also be extracted through infusion in hot water or decoction with other herbs.
